program.name: CSL (Australia) Graduate Program (2027)
program.duration_text: The CSL (Australia) Graduate Program is a two-year program.
program.rotation_text: Graduates are given tailored rotations. You will have a line manager during each rotation.

eligibility.work_rights: You need to be an Australian or New Zealand Citizen, or have Australian Permanent Residency status at the time of application.
eligibility.graduation_window: You must have completed an undergraduate or postgraduate degree in the last three years (2023, 2024, 2025) or be due to complete it by January 2026.
disciplines: Engineering (Mechanical, Chemical, Mechatronics, Electrical, Process, Biomedical)
minimum_requirements: You need to be an Australian or New Zealand Citizen, or have Australian Permanent Residency status at the time of application.
You must have completed an undergraduate or postgraduate degree in the last three years (2023, 2024, 2025) or be due to complete it by January 2026.
You need to be available to commence full time employment from February 2026.

The graduate program is based in Melbourne (Broadmeadows, Tullamarine or CBD in Melbourne, depending on your stream). You need to be located in Melbourne or willing to relocate to Melbourne and cover the costs of relocation.
You need to be available to attend the final Experience Centre stage in-person on 18 or 19 September 2025 in Melbourne, and attend at your own expense.
Demonstrated work experience throughout university is preferred.

stages.name: Online Application Form
stages.details: You complete an online application form and provide information about your academic background, skills and experiences, and your stream preferences. CSL also asks why you are a good fit. The page lists the application form window as 23 Jun to 3 Aug 2025.

stages.name: Online Assessment
stages.details: If you progress past the application form, you complete an online assessment (about 45 minutes). It includes cognitive questions (verbal and numerical), situational judgement scenarios (untimed), and a short video interview (timed).

stages.name: CSL Experience Centre
stages.details: This is the final step and is held in person on 18 or 19 September 2025. You take part in a group exercise and a short interview, and you meet business leaders and graduates.

stages.name: Offer
stages.details: CSL says they will call you within a couple of days after the Experience Centre to let you know if you are successful.

tips: Check all program eligibility requirements before you complete the online application.
Be ready to share your motivations for applying during the online assessment and video responses.
Be available to attend the in-person Experience Centre stage in Melbourne on 18 or 19 September 2025.

exec_themes: Simplify the organisation to improve productivity (reduce cost and complexity, fewer layers of management, and focus on fewer sites).
Refocus strategy on diseases and medicines where CSL has a clear scientific and manufacturing advantage (specialist expertise and differentiated manufacturing).
Drive growth by improving portfolio development and commercialisation (closer integration across R&D, business development, and commercial teams; selective partnering).
Operational excellence in plasma collection and manufacturing (increase plasma volumes, improve yields, and lower cost per litre).
Maintain leadership in core franchises while launching new products (e.g., immunoglobulins and iron/nephrology; new therapy launches mentioned in the annual report).
commercial_context.profit_engine: CSL’s earnings are mainly driven by its vertically integrated plasma-derived therapies business (collecting human plasma, fractionating/manufacturing it into immunoglobulins and other plasma products, and selling these specialised medicines globally). Additional profit drivers include seasonal and pandemic influenza vaccines (Seqirus) and iron deficiency/nephrology medicines (Vifor).
commercial_context.headwinds: The annual report describes a more complex and competitive external environment and notes that CSL Seqirus was negatively impacted by low influenza immunisation rates (particularly in the United States). It also indicates that planned cost-and-complexity reduction initiatives are “painful” and expected to have a significant cost impact in the coming financial year. Other specific headwinds (e.g., pricing pressure, regulation, supply constraints) were not explicit in the portions of official pages accessible in this pull.
commercial_context.esg: CSL frames ESG through its sustainability strategy (launched in 2021) with two pillars: Healthier Communities and Healthier Environment. Examples cited include product donations via the World Federation of Haemophilia partnership and an aspirational access commitment to treat up to 450,000 people with anaemia in at least three low- and middle-income countries with Ferinject by FY2030. On environment, CSL reports progress toward an FY2030 target of a 42% absolute reduction in Scope 1 and 2 emissions from a FY2021 base year, and increased renewable electricity sourcing (37% globally mentioned).
commercial_context.recent_pivot: CSL describes a refocused strategy and operating-model change program aimed at simplifying the business and improving execution (reducing cost and complexity, consolidating footprint, and combining certain commercial/medical functions across Behring and Vifor). A major proposed structural move disclosed is a plan to demerge CSL Seqirus to shareholders as a separate ASX-listed company.

notes: The program page clearly states the program is a two-year program and mentions tailored rotations, plus the main external application link (PushApply).
The program page itself does not clearly state the exact open and close dates; the clearest dates were listed on the Selection Process page for the Online Application Form window.
Eligibility and work rights requirements are listed in the 'Requirements' section on the Selection Process page.
Discipline lists were taken from each stream’s 'Preferred degrees/ disciplines' line on the Graduate Streams page.

Recruitment stages, the application window dates, assessment details, Experience Centre dates, and offer timing are explicitly listed under 'About our recruitment process' on the Selection Process page.

This summary is based on the CSL 2025 Annual Report web version (FY2025, year ended 30 June 2025). Only the portions of the report that were accessible via the official HTML viewer in this session were used.

Some items that are often explicit in annual reports (full ‘Material Risks’ detail, broader macro headwinds, and quantified margin/price pressures) were not available in the captured lines; therefore ‘headwinds’ may be incomplete and is written conservatively.
No third-party or aggregator sources were used; only official CSL investor-report pages on approved domains.
